Metadata.title: 3C Waypoint | Marketing for Foreign Trade
Metadata.description: The marketing agency built inside the foreign trade world — for U.S. customs brokers, freight forwarders, trading companies, trade-tech and trade consultants.

Hero.copy: The marketing agency with a foreign-trade DNA. You keep global supply chains moving. We make sure the market can see it.
Hero.primaryCta: Put my brand on the radar

Problem.title: Trade has a product. It's missing a brand.

items.title: Digital invisibility
items.description: Excellent trade companies that nobody can find on Google. No social presence, no authority online — invisible to the importers actively looking for you.

items.title: Generic messaging
items.description: Marketing that doesn't speak the language of the industry. Copy with zero technical context that convinces no importer, no shipper, no decision-maker.

items.title: Referral dependency
items.description: Growth is stuck because the entire pipeline comes from referrals. No system, no predictability, no way to scale.

Brand.title: An agency built inside the trade world.
paragraphs: 3C WayPoint is the marketing agency specialized in foreign trade. Founded by Sari, a strategist with 10 years in the industry, backed by a full team trained to speak the language of trade — not a generalist agency guessing at your world.
Here, diagnosis comes before execution. The Radar Method — our proprietary framework — makes sure every project starts with what matters: identity, client, presence and reputation.
We're not an agency that learned trade. We're trade people who mastered marketing. That inversion changes everything.
Brand.highlight: The only agency that talks HTS classification, ISF filing and storytelling in the same sentence.

RadarMethod.title: The Radar Method
RadarMethod.copy: A structured diagnosis built on 4 pillars that brings order to the marketing of any trade company. Every project starts with the diagnosis: Identity before Presence, Client before Reputation.

quadrants.label: Client
quadrants.description: Who do you need to talk to?

quadrants.label: Presence
quadrants.description: Which channels should you be on?

quadrants.label: Reputation
quadrants.description: What does the market say about you?

PillarsPractice.title: From diagnosis to execution.
PillarsPractice.copy: Each pillar of the Radar Method translates into concrete deliverables.

items.title: Identity — Who is your company, really?
items.description: Before you show up for the world, you have to know who you are. We define the essence, the positioning and the narrative that sets your company apart in trade.

items.title: Client — Who does your brand need to talk to?
items.description: There's no effective marketing without clarity on the ideal client. We map your ICP, structure your CRM and build the funnels that generate qualified leads in trade.
bullets: CRM setup built for trade workflows

items.title: Presence — Which channels should your brand be on?
items.description: Presence isn't being everywhere. It's being on the right channels, with the right message, for the right audience. We build the digital presence that creates authority and pulls in demand.
bullets: Social media management with technical, on-industry content

items.title: Reputation — What do people say about your brand?
items.description: Reputation is what happens when you're not in the room. We build authority through video, media relations and a real presence at the industry's events.

Personas.title: Built for the people behind global trade.

items.name: Freight Forwarder
items.hook: Every forwarder sells freight. You need to sell trust.
items.pain: You can't differentiate beyond price, so you lose clients to cheaper competitors — because you never built any brand authority.
items.goal: Generate qualified leads who choose you for value, not for the lowest rate on the quote.

items.name: Customs Broker
items.hook: The best broker in town can be invisible on Google.
items.pain: You live entirely on referrals. With no digital presence, you're invisible to new clients and you can't scale.
items.goal: Build digital authority and a steady pipeline of leads — independent of who refers you.

items.name: Trading & Sourcing Company
items.hook: Nobody understands what you actually do. And it's costing you deals.
items.pain: Clients confuse a trading company with a plain importer. Your value proposition is complex and your messaging never explains the model.
items.goal: Clear positioning of the business model and attraction of qualified partners and buyers.

items.name: Trade Tech
items.hook: Great product. Messaging that scares off the person who signs the check.
items.pain: Your communication is too technical for managers and finance. Marketing doesn't translate the value for the people who approve the budget.
items.goal: A qualified B2B pipeline and messaging that speaks to decision-makers, not only to analysts.

items.name: Trade Consultant
items.hook: You have 15 years in trade. Your clients still ask for a discount?
items.pain: You underprice because you don't position yourself as a premium expert. The knowledge is there; the perceived authority isn't.
items.goal: Premium positioning, higher-ticket projects and real thought leadership in the industry.

closing.title: Is your company here?
closing.copy: If you make foreign trade happen behind the scenes, we know how to put you on the market's radar.

WhyUs.title: What no one else has.
WhyUs.copy: Three things you won't find anywhere else in trade marketing.

items.title: A real trade DNA
items.description: The only agency where the brief starts with duty drawback, HTS codes and ACE filings. Our messaging speaks your client's language because it's born inside the industry — not applied from the outside in.

items.title: A complete, experienced team
items.description: A full team with real experience in content and marketing for foreign trade. Agency structure, specialist delivery, people who actually speak the language of trade.

items.title: The Radar Method, our exclusive framework
items.description: A proprietary framework with 4 pillars. Structured diagnosis before any execution. Not guesswork — a method that has already transformed brands in trade.

CTA.title: Marketing for the people who move the world.
CTA.copy: Put your trade brand on the market's radar.

Contact.title: Let's get you on the radar.
Contact.copy: Tell us about your company. We'll show you exactly where the market isn't seeing you yet.

form.name: Name
form.challenge: What is your biggest visibility challenge today?

success.title: Message sent.
success.copy: We'll review your challenge and respond within one business day.
